content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(4, 9, 1), (5, 9, 1), (1, 2, 2), (5, 6, 2), (6, 9, 4), (0, 3, 5), (3, 4, 5), (7, 9, 5), (6, 8, 6), (1, 6, 8), (3, 6, 8), (3, 9, 11), (0, 1, 15), (0, 6, 15), (5, 7, 16), (2, 8, 17), (4, 6, 17), (8, 9, 18)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 5 exactly at time 16.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 16:

* Edge (4, 9, 1) has node 4 and time 1. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (5, 9, 1) has node 5 and time 1. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 2, 2) has node 1 and time 2. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (5, 6, 2) has node 5 and time 2. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (6, 9, 4) has node 6 and time 4. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 3, 5) has node 0 and time 5. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (3, 4, 5) has node 3 and time 5. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (7, 9, 5) has node 7 and time 5. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (6, 8, 6) has node 6 and time 6. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (1, 6, 8) has node 1 and time 8. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (3, 6, 8) has node 3 and time 8. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (3, 9, 11) has node 3 and time 11. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (0, 1, 15) has node 0 and time 15. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (0, 6, 15) has node 0 and time 15. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (5, 7, 16) has node 5 and time 16. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 8, 17) has node 2 and time 17. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (4, 6, 17) has node 4 and time 17. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (8, 9, 18) has node 8 and time 18. -> Add node 9.

The nodes matched are 9, 6, 8, and 9.

Answer: [9, 6, 8, 9]
